ImportFromOutlandsLedgerActionFX - Class in nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.actions.scaledger
JavaFX action that imports an SCA ledger stored in an Excel workbook (typically .xlsx) and displays the parsed rows inside the shared PageViewerPanel.

INV401K - Static variable in interface nonprofitbookkeeping.model.ofx.OfxTags
For 401(k) accounts, account information aggregate
INV401KBAL - Static variable in interface nonprofitbookkeeping.model.ofx.OfxTags
For 401(k) accounts, account balance aggregate
INV401KSOURCE - Static variable in interface nonprofitbookkeeping.model.ofx.OfxTags

isDynamic() - Method in class nonprofitbookkeeping.reports.jasper.model.CellItem
 
isEffectivelyBlank() - Method in class nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.actions.scaledger.LedgerRow
Convenience check: true if this row is basically spacing / informational only (no date AND no non-empty splits).
isEmpty() - Method in class nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.actions.scaledger.LedgerSplit
Convenience: true if this split is effectively empty (no amount and no category).
isEnableFullYearOption() - Method in class nonprofitbookkeeping.model.SettingsModel
Checks if is enable full year option.
isEnableFundAccounting() - Method in class nonprofitbookkeeping.model.CompanyProfileModel
Checks if fund accounting features are enabled.
isEnableInventory() - Method in class nonprofitbookkeeping.model.CompanyProfileModel
Checks if inventory management features are enabled.
isEnableLastMonthOption() - Method in class nonprofitbookkeeping.model.SettingsModel
Checks if is enable last month option.
isEnableMultiCurrency() - Method in class nonprofitbookkeeping.model.CompanyProfileModel
Checks if multi-currency support is enabled.
isEnableYearToDateOption() - Method in class nonprofitbookkeeping.model.SettingsModel
Checks if is enable year to date option.
isFreeze() - Method in class nonprofitbookkeeping.model.AccountingEntry
Checks if the transaction for this entry is frozen (i.e., has been set).
isHeadlessEnvironment() - Method in class nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.actions.HelpAction
Allows subclasses (such as tests) to override the headless detection logic.

Returns true if the loader is set to ignore consistency problems
isInitialized() - Static method in class nonprofitbookkeeping.core.Database
Checks if is initialized.
isOpen() - Static method in class nonprofitbookkeeping.model.CurrentCompany
Checks if a company is currently considered open.
isRequireAllAccounts() - Method in class nonprofitbookkeeping.reports.datasource.LedgerQueryCriteria
Checks if is require all accounts.
isRequireAllAccounts() - Method in class nonprofitbookkeeping.reports.jasper.runtime.ReportContext
Indicates whether all provided accounts must be present on a transaction.
isSingleBeanReport() - Method in class nonprofitbookkeeping.reports.jasper.AbstractReportGenerator
Indicates whether this report should be driven by a single bean that represents the entire report output.

Determines whether an account is eligible for statement export.
